page: Microsoft Azure FX24mds is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the FXMDVS server family. It features 24 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server is equipped with 504.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 21.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 1032 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage for high-throughput disk operations. It does not feature any dedicated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio, the FX24mds offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive memory footprints relative to compute capacity, minimizing the need to provision excess vCPUs simply to acquire sufficient RAM. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise resource planning workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure FX24mds is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the FXMDVS family, designed for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources. Powered by an x86_64 Intel processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance provides 24 dedicated vCPUs and 504.0 GB of RAM, translating to 21.0 GB of memory per core. Storage capabilities include 1032 GB of local disk space alongside support for Premium Storage, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high memory density makes this server a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for memory-intensive operations, avoiding the need to over-provision compute cores. The FX24mds is suited for hosting large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX24mds is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 24 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 504 GB of RAM, and 1032 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale databases and in-memory workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure FX24mds is a memory-optimized server with 24 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 504 GB RAM, and 1032 GB local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-intensive virtual machine featuring high RAM-to-core density and local storage for demanding database and in-memory enterprise applications.

1032 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Suited for in-memory databases and enterprise applications
